Event: Roving Restaurant March 2026
Event Date: 23/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR399
Snake Charmer Gear

When the armor's wearer or an allied unit receives a negative effect, 4 random negative effects are removed from the armor's wearer and each of the allied units. Their damage, physical and magic armor are increased by 85% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. When the ability is triggered, the enemy unit that cast the effect, and all enemy units in a large radius around them, have their armor sundered. When their armor is sundered, the enemy units receive pure damage equal to 35% of their max health, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. This enemy unit also receives pure damage equal to 30% of their maximum health for 4 sec. The ability triggers at most once every 9 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
